mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, avatar, email, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
